title: BREAKING: Trump convenes national security team as US Air Force has worst day in war; Iran refuses ceasefire

title: BREAKING: Qatar officially declined to serve as lead mediator for US-Iran ceasefire
snippet: Qatar told US officials it is not eager to spearhead negotiations, further stalling diplomatic efforts (WSJ/Reuters)

title: Trump hints at chilling worst-case scenario after US F-15 crew goes missing in Iran
snippet: Trump hints at chilling worst-case scenario after US F-15 crew goes missing in Iran

title: BREAKING: ISM Manufacturing PMI prices paid jumped 7.8pts to 78.3, highest since June 2022
snippet: ISM Manufacturing PMI March: prices paid jumped 7.8pts to 78.3 driven by surging oil prices and supply chain disruptions

title: BREAKING: Trump will not say what US will do if missing F-15E pilot is harmed
snippet: First American aviator shot down over enemy territory since April 2003

title: BREAKING: Middle East oil exports plunge 63pct; jet fuel down 85pct
snippet: Total Middle East oil product exports plunged 63pct in March; jet fuel exports down 85pct. Strait of Hormuz crisis in full swing

title: Iran Parliament Speaker: Regime change downgraded to: Can anyone find our pilots?
snippet: Iran Parliament Speaker on downed F-15E: After defeating Iran 37 times... downgraded from regime change to: Hey! Can anyone find our pilots?

title: BREAKING: Iran NOT willing to meet US officials in Pakistan; mediation dead end
snippet: Iran told mediators it is NOT willing to meet US officials in Pakistan; current mediation round reached dead end. Turkey/Egypt still pushing. New venues: Doha or Istanbul (WSJ)

title: BREAKING: US F-15E shot down over Iran; two pilots aboard; Iran offering reward for capture
snippet: US F-15E shot down over Iran, two pilots aboard. First known loss of US jet inside Iran since war began. Iran offering valuable reward for captured pilots

title: Second US combat plane crashed near Strait of Hormuz; lone pilot rescued
snippet: Second US combat plane crashed near Strait of Hormuz same time as F-15E shootdown. Lone pilot safely rescued

title: Iran downs 2 US warplanes, 2 missiles, 3 drones in single day
snippet: Iran downs 2 US warplanes, 2 missiles, 3 drones in single day. Iran calls it black day for US and Israeli air forces

title: Witkoff and Kushner led Iran nuclear negotiations without nuclear experts
snippet: Witkoff and Kushner led nuclear negotiations with Iran in Geneva WITHOUT nuclear experts. Witkoff admitted he is not an expert in nuclear. Vance reportedly opposed the war

title: Trump on Iran: Keep the oil, anyone?
snippet: Trump on Iran: Keep the oil, anyone?

title: CDS trading volume surged 69pct Q1 2026 to 4.5 trillion dollars, highest on record
snippet: CDS trading volume surged 69pct in Q1 2026 to 4.5 trillion dollars, highest on record. Iran War plus AI debt concerns driving hedging. Europe turned bearish for first time since 2018

title: Hedge funds sold world equities at fastest pace in 10 years in March
snippet: Hedge funds sold world equities at fastest pace in 10 years in March. Short sales outpacing longs by 7.6 to 1. 76pct concentrated in index and ETF products. Short squeeze risk accelerating

title: US job growth February revised DOWN to minus 133K; stagflation signal
snippet: US job growth in February revised DOWN from minus 92K to minus 133K. Biggest monthly US job loss since December 2020. One-year inflation expectations exceed 5pct. Hallmark of stagflation

title: Trump: No its war (NBC re F-15E shootdown impact on talks)
snippet: Trump asked if downed jet to impact talks: No its war. NBC

title: Has Concern Over Hormuz Made Us Forget The Red Sea?
snippet: Has Concern Over Hormuz Made Us Forget The Red Sea? Red Sea security far from resolved

title: Trump purging generals opposed to ground war in Iran
snippet: Trump purging generals opposed to ground war in Iran. Active duty and retired US Army Rangers expressing shock over forced resignations of General Randy George

title: Brent crude rose 8pct to above 109 dollars per barrel after Trump threats
snippet: Brent crude oil rose approximately 8pct Friday to above 109 dollars per barrel after Trump's renewed threats to destroy Iranian infrastructure
